store_exit_prompt.speaker: Narrator
store_exit_prompt.text:
The door swings open. Cold air hits your face.
⌈The rain has stopped.⌋
A bridge stretches across the dark canal ahead.

choices.text: Stand in the doorway a moment longer.

store_exit_stand.speaker: Narrator
store_exit_stand.text:
The night stretches out. Somewhere, a dog barks.
The bridge waits.

store_exit_stand_go.speaker: Narrator
store_exit_stand_go.text: You push off the doorframe. The bridge is your only way forward.
